pageDescription: Calculate the future value of an annuity based on regular contributions and interest rates for retirement planning and investment analysis

placeholders.presentValue: Enter present value or initial investment

definition.title: Annuity Definition
definition.description: Financial product that provides regular payments over a specified period in exchange for an initial lump sum or series of payments

types.title: Annuity Types
types.description: Fixed annuities offer guaranteed returns; variable annuities offer market-based returns

presentValue.title: Present Value Calculation
presentValue.description: Determines the current value of a series of future payments

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides annuity value estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual annuity values may vary based on contract terms and market conditions

importantNotesList: Annuities can provide guaranteed income in retirement
Consider fees and surrender charges before purchasing annuities
Fixed annuities offer predictable returns but may not keep pace with inflation
Variable annuities offer growth potential but come with investment risk

messages.enterInformation: Enter your annuity information to calculate future value
messages.resultMessage: Your annuity calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides annuity value estimates based on mathematical formulas. Actual annuity values may vary based on contract terms, fees, market conditions, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized annuity advice and retirement planning, consult financial advisors or insurance professionals with expertise in annuity products and individual financial circumstances.

errors.presentValue: Please enter a valid present value
errors.paymentAmount: Please enter a valid payment amount
errors.interestRate: Please enter a valid annual interest rate
errors.numberOfPeriods: Please enter a valid number of periods

tooltips.presentValue: Initial lump sum investment in the annuity
tooltips.paymentAmount: Regular payment amount contributed to the annuity
tooltips.interestRate: Expected annual interest rate or rate of return
tooltips.paymentTiming: Whether payments are made at beginning or end of period

add_at_each_periods_beginning_annuity_du: Add at each period's beginning (Annuity Due)
when_enabled_deposits_are_made_at_the_be: When enabled, deposits are made at the beginning of each period and earn interest immediately.
monthly_deposits_use_monthly_compounding:
Monthly deposits use monthly compounding; annual deposits use annual
                        compounding.
end_balance_total_additions_interest_ear: End Balance, Total Additions, Interest Earned
enter_your_annuity_information_to_see_yo: Enter your annuity information to see your results
